training.question: Is this laptop chip-level repair course beginner-friendly?
training.answer: Absolutely! This course is thoughtfully designed by industry experts to support complete beginners as well as those with basic repair experience. Training starts from core fundamentals and gradually progresses to advanced chip-level laptop motherboard repair, ensuring clarity and confidence at every step.

training.question: What is the duration of the laptop repair course?
training.answer: The course duration typically ranges between 60 to 90 days, covering theory sessions, intensive hands-on practical training, and real-time live laptop repair practice.

training.question: Can I really learn laptop repair in just 90 days?
training.answer: Yes—definitely! With structured learning and regular practice, you can become job-ready within 90 days by focusing on strong understanding of schematics and datasheets, extensive hands-on practice on real laptop motherboard faults, and continuous troubleshooting practice to improve speed, accuracy, and confidence. This approach helps you grow into a skilled and confident laptop repair technician.

training.question: Will this course make me job-ready?
training.answer: Yes. After completing the course, you will gain industry-ready chip-level repair skills that allow you to work in laptop service centres, join repair workshops, or confidently start your own laptop repair business.

training.question: How much practical training does this course include?
training.answer: Practical training is the core of this course. Students work on real laptops and live motherboard faults, learning advanced fault diagnosis and repair through step-by-step guidance from expert trainers.

training.question: Do you teach schematic and datasheet-level troubleshooting?
training.answer: Yes. We provide in-depth training in schematic reading, board view analysis, datasheet interpretation, and circuit tracing, helping you become a highly skilled and logical chip-level laptop repair professional.

training.question: Are both online and offline training options available?
training.answer: Yes. We offer offline classroom training in Pune & PCMC, along with online laptop repair courses for flexible learning—so you can choose the mode that fits your schedule and location.

training.question: Is support available after completing the course?
training.answer: Yes. Even after course completion, students receive technical support, doubt-clearing sessions, and expert guidance. We also provide assistance related to jobs and starting a laptop repair business.

training.question: Will I receive a certificate after completing the course?
training.answer: Yes. You will receive a Course Completion Certificate from Laptian Technical Institute, which adds credibility for jobs, freelancing, and starting your own repair service.

training.question: Does the course cover MacBooks and latest laptop models?
training.answer: The course primarily focuses on Windows laptops and latest-generation motherboard repair techniques, ensuring you learn the most in-demand skills used in modern repair labs.

training.question: What qualifications are required to join this laptop repair course?
training.answer: No specific degree or technical background is required. Anyone with an interest in laptop repair—whether from a technical or non-technical background—can enroll and succeed in this course.

services.question: How long does a typical laptop repair take?
services.answer: Most repairs are completed within 24-48 hours. However, the exact turnaround time depends on the issue complexity and parts availability. For common problems like screen replacement or keyboard repairs, we often offer same-day service. We'll provide you with an accurate timeline after our free diagnosis.

services.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
services.answer: Yes! All our repairs come with a comprehensive 6-month warranty covering both parts and labor. If you experience any issues related to the repair work within this period, we'll fix it at no additional cost. This warranty demonstrates our confidence in the quality of our work and genuine parts.

services.question: What brands of laptops do you repair?
services.answer: We repair all major laptop brands including Dell, HP, Lenovo, Acer, ASUS, Apple MacBook, MSI, Toshiba, Samsung, and more. Our certified technicians have extensive experience with various models and configurations, from budget laptops to high-end gaming and professional workstations.

services.question: Is the diagnosis really free?
services.answer: Yes, absolutely! We offer completely free diagnostics with no hidden charges. Our expert technicians will thoroughly examine your laptop, identify the problem, and provide a detailed quote before any repair work begins. You're under no obligation to proceed with the repair after the diagnosis.

services.question: Do you use genuine parts for repairs?
services.answer: We use only genuine OEM (Original Equipment Manufacturer) parts and high-quality compatible components. All parts come with manufacturer warranties and are sourced from authorized distributors. We never compromise on quality, ensuring your laptop performs optimally after repair.

services.question: Can you recover data from my laptop if it's not working?
services.answer: Yes, we offer professional data recovery services. Whether your laptop won't boot, has a damaged hard drive, or suffered physical damage, our specialists can attempt to recover your important files, photos, and documents. We'll assess the situation during diagnosis and explain the recovery options available.

services.question: Do you provide pickup and delivery service?
services.answer: Yes, we offer convenient pickup and delivery service within the city for your laptop repairs. You can schedule a pickup at your preferred time, and we'll deliver the repaired laptop back to you. This service ensures a hassle-free repair experience without you having to visit our service center.

services.question: What if the repair costs more than expected?
services.answer: Transparency is our priority. After our free diagnosis, we provide a detailed quote with no hidden charges. If during the repair we discover additional issues, we'll contact you for approval before proceeding. You'll never be surprised by unexpected costs – we believe in upfront, honest pricing.
